meta_title: For Freelancers: email automation to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to email automation and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Email Automation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage email automation to overcome the no-portfolio trap. An intermediate tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale your freelance work.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build an automated outbound engine that offers high-value audits to your ideal clients. By using Antigravity to structure your data and Claude Code to script the delivery, you turn cold outreach into a scalable, automated asset that proves your technical expertise instantly.
content.intro:
The silence of a blank portfolio is the greatest barrier to freelance success. You are trapped in a loop: you need clients to build a portfolio, but you need a portfolio to land clients. It is a friction-filled purgatory that kills more careers than lack of skill ever could. 

But what if you stopped waiting for permission? By building a high-velocity email automation system, you shift the dynamic from 'begging for work' to 'providing technical solutions.' This isn't just about sending emails; it is about deploying an automated consultant that demonstrates your value before you ever hop on a discovery call.

steps.title: Define Your Target Niche Audit
steps.description: Identify a specific technical pain point for a niche and create a script that automates the generation of a personalized 'technical health check' for their site.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a lead database that tracks target company URL, founder name, and identified technical debt indicators.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a JSON schema for lead_data.json with fields for company_url, lead_name, and custom_audit_points'

steps.title: Build the Scraper Engine
steps.description: Use Claude Code to create a lightweight scraper that gathers relevant contact info and site performance metrics to feed your automation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust Python script using Playwright to scrape metadata and performance indicators for a list of target URLs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a scraper.py script that visits target_urls.txt and captures page title and meta description'

steps.title: Develop the AI Personalization Layer
steps.description: Use the LLM to generate custom, high-value email copy based on the technical data you scraped, ensuring it never sounds like a template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a prompt template for generating a 3-sentence technical audit email that references specific findings from the scraper.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement a function that takes lead_data.json and generates a personalized email draft using the Anthropic API'

steps.title: Configure the Delivery Pipeline
steps.description: Integrate your script with an email API like Resend or SendGrid to queue your personalized audits for delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a module to batch send emails through the Resend API with rate limiting to prevent spam flagging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create mailer.py that iterates through processed_leads.json and sends emails via Resend API with 2-second delays'

steps.title: Automate the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Set up a webhook to track opens and clicks, allowing you to prioritize follow-ups for prospects who engaged with your audit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a simple FastAPI endpoint to receive and log webhook events from the email provider.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'deploy a FastAPI app that logs webhook events to a local database for analytics'

pro_tips: Always include a 'technical loom' link in your email; seeing you explain the audit on video builds 10x more trust than text alone.
Use a dedicated domain for outreach to protect your main business email reputation from spam filters.
Implement a 'warm-up' period where you send only 5 emails a day, scaling up by 5 each day to establish domain authority.
Focus your audit on one specific, easily fixable technical flaw; it makes the client feel like you've already started working for them.
Use Claude Code to refactor your scripts into a modular library so you can pivot your target niche in minutes, not hours.
content.next_steps: Once your pipeline is live, monitor the engagement metrics for 48 hours. If response rates are low, iterate on the audit-specific data points you scrape rather than changing the email body.
content.conversion_block: You now have a system that works while you sleep, turning cold prospects into warm leads by providing genuine value first. Stop chasing work and start building the engine that brings the work to you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
